content:

```json
[
	{"bbox_2d": [71, 65, 119, 90], "text_content": "ST"},
	{"bbox_2d": [818, 65, 926, 79], "text_content": "STUSB4500"},
	{"bbox_2d": [783, 83, 926, 95], "text_content": "Functional description"},
	{"bbox_2d": [73, 121, 417, 140], "text_content": "1 Functional description"},
	{"bbox_2d": [167, 161, 920, 231], "text_content": "The STUSB4500 is a USB Type-C™ and power delivery controller IC for sink applications. It is able to negotiate a power delivery contract with a source without MCU support (auto-run mode). It relies on proprietary algorithms and configurable PDO (power data objects) thanks to an integrated non-volatile memory. It supports dead battery mode to allow a system to be powered from an external source directly. Combined with its capability to negotiate directly a power contract, the STUSB4500 is the ideal controller device for autonomous systems requiring high power charging profile to be fully operational."},
	{"bbox_2d": [167, 240, 382, 252], "text_content": "The STUSB4500 major role is to:"},
	{"bbox_2d": [167, 256, 692, 268], "text_content": "1. Detect the connection between two USB Type-C ports (attach detection)"},
	{"bbox_2d": [167, 272, 492, 284], "text_content": "2. Establish a valid source-to-sink connection"},
	{"bbox_2d": [167, 288, 567, 300], "text_content": "3. Determine the attached device mode: source or debug accessory"},
	{"bbox_2d": [167, 304, 828, 316], "text_content": "4. Resolve cable orientation and twist connections to establish USB data routing (MUX control)"},
	{"bbox_2d": [167, 320, 752, 332], "text_content": "5. Negotiate a USB power delivery (PD) contract with a PD capable source device"},
	{"bbox_2d": [167, 336, 722, 348], "text_content": "6. Configure the incoming VBUS power path and the charging paths accordingly"},
	{"bbox_2d": [167, 352, 682, 364], "text_content": "7. Monitor the VBUS power path and manage the VBUS voltage transitions"},
	{"bbox_2d": [167, 368, 447, 380], "text_content": "8. Handle the high voltage protections"},
	{"bbox_2d": [167, 387, 388, 399], "text_content": "The STUSB4500 also provides:"},
	{"bbox_2d": [209, 405, 339, 417], "text_content": "Dead battery mode"},
	{"bbox_2d": [209, 421, 565, 433], "text_content": "PDO (power data object) customization through NVM"},
	{"bbox_2d": [209, 437, 512, 449], "text_content": "Internal and/or external VBUS discharge paths"},
	{"bbox_2d": [209, 453, 452, 465], "text_content": "Dual high power charging path support"},
	{"bbox_2d": [209, 469, 452, 481], "text_content": "Debug accessory mode detection"},
	{"bbox_2d": [209, 485, 789, 497], "text_content": "Customization of the device configuration through NVM to support specific applications"},
	{"bbox_2d": [73, 514, 313, 533], "text_content": "1.1 Block overview"},
	{"bbox_2d": [422, 552, 671, 564], "text_content": "Figure 1. Functional block diagram"},
	{"bbox_2d": [338, 593, 747, 860], "text_content": "VREG_1V2 VREG_2V7 VSYS VDD Internal supply VBUS status voltage monitoring VBUS_VS_DISCH RESET POR VBUS_EN_SNK A_B_SIDE DISCH ADDR[1..0] SCL SDA ALERT ATTACH POWER_OK2 POWER_OK3 GPIO GND Port C controller CC line access CC1DB CC1 CC2 CC2DB Port status Control Device Policy Manager Policy Engine Protocol Layer Physical Layer I2C slave"},
	{"bbox_2d": [73, 972, 160, 981], "text_content": "DS12499 - Rev 8"},
	{"bbox_2d": [876, 972, 924, 981], "text_content": "page 2/42"}
]
```
